templates.name: Editor Check-in Nudge
templates.description: Sent when editor hasn't checked in for 8+ hours
templates.template: Hey, we haven't heard from you in {hours} hours. Is everything ok?

templates.name: Editor WhatsApp Escalation
templates.description: Sent via WhatsApp when editor hasn't responded for 24+ hours
templates.template: Hey, this is {pm_name} from KS Media. Is everything ok? We haven't got an update from you on Slack for almost a day. Please check in ASAP.

templates.name: Client Video Review
templates.description: Sent to client when video is ready for review

templates.name: Client Video Scheduled
templates.description: Sent to client when video has been scheduled on YouTube
templates.template: Hey {client_name}, new video is scheduled for {schedule_day} 11am EST.

templates.name: Editor Payment Request
templates.description: Sent to editors on 15th and 30th for payment processing
templates.template: Hey, we're paying you today. Please send over how much $ we owe you and a breakdown of the videos you did. Thank you!

templates.name: Editor Invoice Follow-up
templates.description: Sent after editor submits payment amount
templates.template: Thanks. Could you send an invoice about it?

templates.name: Editor New Assignment
templates.description: Sent when a new video is assigned to an editor
templates.template: New video assigned: {video_ref} for {client_name}. Deadline: {deadline}. Let me know if you have any questions!

templates.name: Client QC Progress
templates.description: Sent to client when video enters QC stage
templates.template: We're close to the finish line on your latest video! We're doing final quality checks now.

templates.name: Client Introduction (Existing Client)
templates.description: Introduction message for existing clients when new PM starts
templates.template: Hey {client_name}, great to meet you and I'm excited to start working together. Samu will still be the main point of contact, but I'll help wherever I can.

templates.name: Editor Introduction
templates.description: Introduction message when new editor joins
templates.template: Hey {editor_name}, I'm {pm_name}, the ops manager at KS Media. Looking forward to working with you!

templates.name: Editor Deadline Reminder
templates.description: Sent when a video deadline is approaching (1 day away)
templates.template: Heads up — {video_ref} deadline is {when}! Current status: {status}. Let me know if you need anything.

templates.name: Client Video Progress
templates.description: General progress update message for client
